inputs.label: Head Circumference
inputs.businessContext: Measured circumference around widest part of head.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured circumference around widest part of head.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Başın en geniş kısmı etrafında ölçülen çevre.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gemessener Umfang an der breitesten Stelle des Kopfes.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Circonférence mesurée autour de la partie la plus large de la tête.
businessContext_i18n.es: Circunferencia medida alrededor de la parte más ancha de la cabeza.

inputs.label: Measurement System
inputs.businessContext: 0 for metric input in cm, 1 for imperial input in inches.

businessContext_i18n.en: 0 for metric input in cm, 1 for imperial input in inches.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Metrik giriş için 0 (cm), emperyal giriş için 1 (inç).
businessContext_i18n.de: 0 für metrische Eingabe in cm, 1 für imperiale Eingabe in Zoll.
businessContext_i18n.fr: 0 pour une entrée métrique en cm, 1 pour une entrée impériale en pouces.
businessContext_i18n.es: 0 para entrada métrica en cm, 1 para entrada imperial en pulgadas.

inputs.label: Hair Thickness Allowance
inputs.businessContext: Extra centimeters to add for thick hair (0 for none).

businessContext_i18n.en: Extra centimeters to add for thick hair (0 for none).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kalın saç için eklenecek ekstra santimetre (yoksa 0).
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzliche Zentimeter für dickes Haar (0 für keine).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Centimètres supplémentaires à ajouter pour les cheveux épais (0 si aucun).
businessContext_i18n.es: Centímetros adicionales para cabello grueso (0 si no aplica).

inputs.label: Fit Preference
inputs.businessContext: 0 for tight fit (subtract 0.5 cm), 1 for standard, 2 for loose fit (add 0.5 cm).

businessContext_i18n.en: 0 for tight fit (subtract 0.5 cm), 1 for standard, 2 for loose fit (add 0.5 cm).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sıkı uyum için 0 (0,5 cm çıkar), standart için 1, gevşek uyum için 2 (0,5 cm ekle).
businessContext_i18n.de: 0 für enge Passform (0,5 cm abziehen), 1 für Standard, 2 für lockere Passform (0,5 cm hinzufügen).
businessContext_i18n.fr: 0 pour un ajustement serré (soustraire 0,5 cm), 1 pour standard, 2 pour un ajustement lâche (ajouter 0,5 cm).
businessContext_i18n.es: 0 para ajuste ceñido (restar 0.5 cm), 1 para estándar, 2 para ajuste holgado (sumar 0.5 cm).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
